text: IRDM up 168.1% YTD from $17.65 to $47.32. 71.6% gross margins, $253M FCF, $0.60 dividend. Revenue growth is only 1.9% though — this run is entirely the defense contract re-rating and Aireon. The numbers are in the article.
author: data_dependent_1

text: The DoD EMSS contract is $738.5M. Iridium owns the only truly global LEO constellation that works when everything else is jammed or out of range. That's not a growth stock — it's strategic infrastructure the Pentagon treats as essential.
author: RN_Geo
